attr.title: eldritch
attr.desc: A first-person action game inspired by roguelikes, immersive sims, and H. P. Lovecraft.
attr.desc_md: A first-person action game inspired by roguelikes, immersive sims, and H. P. Lovecraft.
attr.inst: buy the game, put the port files at ports/, then copy all the game *.cpk files to ports/eldritch/ where the "Eld" file is.
attr.inst_md:
1. buy the game
2. put the port files at ports/
3. copy all the game *.cpk files to ports/eldritch/ (where the "Eld" file is)
4. ready to go!
